title: Important Animals and Birds Based on Habitat

content.title: a) Major Wildlife
content.content: Major wildlife found in this sub-metropolitan city include rabbits, monkeys, foxes, porcupines, and others.

content.title: b) Reptiles and Amphibians
content.content: Reptiles and amphibians found in this sub-metropolitan city especially include snakes, water snakes, lizards, monitor lizards, and frogs.

content.title: c) Insects and Small Creatures
content.content: Butterflies, grasshoppers, dragonflies, crickets, fireflies, wasps, bees, spiders, mites, and centipedes are among the insects and small creatures found here.
